summary: Hi Grace — we reviewed your Spring 2026 account (Delaney and Dutton, Brighton). Winter is complete and closed on our side; this summary covers Spring class tuition only.
SPRING TUITION: $900.00 per child × 2 = $1,800.00 gross. Your approved Spring sibling discount of $90.00 ($45.00 per child) reduces the net amount due to $1,710.00 for the session.

CURRENT SPRING BALANCE: $0.00 — both Spring enrollments are paid in full. Nothing else is due for Spring 2026 (session ends June 12). Your 2026 membership ($175.00) is also paid; that is separate from class tuition.

HOW THE $362 CHARGE TODAY FITS (June 6, 2026): Autopay collected $362.00 per child ($724.00 total). That was the remaining Spring balance after your earlier Spring payments — not a new or duplicate fee. Autopay ran because autopay is enabled on your account.
SPRING PAYMENTS ONLY (what applied to Delaney + Dutton Spring 2026):

• April 4, 2026 — $285.00 — Stripe pi_3TIVRAGhVuNOnUs71GTZS1T9 — First biweekly installment at Spring enrollment (your $90.00 sibling credit was applied at this checkout; the payment plan total after credit was $1,710.00, or 6 installments of $285.00).
• May 29, 2026 — $701.00 — Stripe pi_3TcQDqGhVuNOnUs71288rP33 — Stripe Link payment applied to Spring (split across both children in our records).
• June 6, 2026 — $362.00 — Stripe pi_3TfB5vGhVuNOnUs71mnmKK3d — Delaney, Spring final balance (autopay).
• June 6, 2026 — $362.00 — Stripe pi_3TfB5wGhVuNOnUs71Nicze79 — Dutton, Spring final balance (autopay).
SPRING MATH CHECK: $285.00 + $701.00 + $724.00 = $1,710.00 in card payments, plus the $90.00 sibling credit = $1,800.00 Spring tuition paid in full.

BEFORE TODAY'S CHARGES: After the April and May Spring payments, $724.00 remained ($362.00 per child). That is why today's autopay was $362.00 per child — not $181.00. (Any other charges on your card from late April were for the completed Winter session and are not part of this Spring balance.)
STRIPE RECEIPTS: Stripe emails a receipt to gciciotti29@gmail.com for each charge. You can also search your inbox for the payment references above (they start with pi_).

VIEW YOUR ACCOUNT: Sign in at accounts.americanseekersacademy.com → Payments. Reply if any amount does not match your bank statement, or if you would like autopay turned off for future sessions. Thank you — ASA Brighton.
